description: CompositionPrinted racerback vest made of 96% cotton and 4% elastane, with bold horizontal stripes in bright coloursFittingRegularWash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak Flat dry in shade Do not wring or twist To maintain shape, fold and stack rather than hang Moderate warm iron Go bright and vibrant with this striped racerback vest from spykar.
